name: team success rate from plays
description: Team success rate from plays with filter condition
expected_query: with "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_REG_WEEK_19', '2023_REG_WEEK_20', '2023_REG_WEEK_21', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team" having sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) > '0.4'), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays" AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 inner join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_success_rate_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
